pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for this exact path for verification
setup_task.sh sets up the project files in this directory

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the HEC-RAS Muncie Example Project, a real dataset from the USACE, but setup_task.sh synthetically injects randomized values (Plan Title, Simulation Dates, and Computation Interval) into the .p04 plan file for each run. The project files are correctly staged at the verified path `/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie`. The agent must parse the .prj and modified .p04 files, and output a JSON configuration report to the verified path `/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/model_config.json`.
